meta.title: Christian Shema
meta.author: Paul
meta.tradition_notes: 1 Corinthians 8:6 -- the Pauline expansion of the Jewish Shema; an early Christological confession.

provenance.notes: Proof texts from Creeds.json are already in OSIS format -- raw and osis fields are identical. Content used as canonical text; ContentWithProofs preserved as content_with_proofs.

units.content: There is one God, the Father, from whom are all things and for whom we exist, and one Lord, Jesus Christ, through whom are all things and through whom we exist.
units.content_with_proofs: There is one God, the Father, from whom are all things and for whom we exist, and one Lord, Jesus Christ, through whom are all things and through whom we exist.[1]
